General.Name: Quantong Holdings Ltd
General.Description: China Hongbao Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a foundation subcontractor for private and public sectors in Hong Kong and People's Republic of China. The company operates through Foundation and other Construction Works, Internet Services, and Supply and Installation of New Energy Charging Piles segments. It involved in the rental of machinery; provision of machinery repair and maintenance; provision of O2O commerce; and supply of chain management services; and supply construction materials, such as cement, machinery spare parts and loose tools, diesel fuel, and steel pile and casing. The company was formerly known as Quantong Holdings Limited and changed its name to China Hongbao Holdings Limited in August 2022. China Hongbao Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Two Sky Parc, Kwun Tong, Hong Kong
